description: B&H Photo product search results (experimental — no reliable data-testid or semantic selectors found during probing)

_notes.domStructure: B&H's DOM had no data-selenium, data-testid, or semantic class names on product card containers during probing. Product links (a[href*='/c/product/']) are the most reliable anchor. Parent cards contain title and price as plain text but lack distinguishing selectors for individual fields.
_notes.fallback: Raw text fallback is recommended — structured extraction will be limited to title only
